title: chelone obliqua subsp. speciosa
intro: Chelone obliqua subsp. speciosa, also known as the turtlehead flower, is a perennial plant species native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Chelone obliqua subsp. speciosa include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
